enemy_ship_count: Count all visible enemy ships. Ignore the player ship and all shots.
How many enemy ships are visible in the playfield? Do not count the player ship or projectiles.
Count the enemy ships only. Ignore red enemy shots, blue player shots, and the player ship.
What is the total number of visible enemy ships?
Count every enemy ship shown in the playfield; do not count lane pads, shots, or the player ship.
enemy_ship_hit_count: {space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Each blue player shot can destroy one enemy ship above it in the same lane, hitting the lower enemy ships first. How many enemy ships can be destroyed by the current blue shots?
{space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Count enemy ships destroyed by blue shots in their lane; each blue shot destroys at most one ship, starting with the lower ships.
Blue player shots move upward and enemy ships stay in their lanes. Each blue shot can destroy one enemy ship above it, with lower ships hit first. How many ships can be destroyed?

{space_shooter_lane_rule_text} A blue player shot can hit one enemy ship above it in its lane. If a lane has several ships, lower ships are hit first. How many enemy ships can the visible blue shots destroy?
Count enemy ships that can be destroyed by the current blue shots. Each blue shot hits one ship above it in the same vertical lane, starting from the lower ships. {space_shooter_lane_rule_text}
hit_enemy_ship_label: {space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Each blue player shot can destroy one enemy ship above it in the same lane, hitting lower enemy ships first. Which labeled enemy ship will be hit?
Blue player shots move upward and enemy ships stay in their lanes. Each blue shot can destroy one enemy ship above it, starting with the lower ships. Which labeled enemy ship is hit?
{space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Among the labeled enemy ships, which one will be destroyed by a current blue shot?
A blue player shot can hit one enemy ship above it in the same lane. If several ships are in that lane, lower ships are hit first. Which labeled enemy ship will be hit?
Which labeled enemy ship can be destroyed by the current blue shots? {space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Blue shots hit lower same-lane ships first.
first_hit_enemy_ship_label: {space_shooter_lane_rule_text} A blue shot first hits the nearest enemy ship above it in the same lane. Among the labeled enemy ships, which ship is hit first?
Blue player shots move upward in their lanes. Compare when the labeled enemy ships would be hit by the current blue shots. Which labeled ship is hit first?
{space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Which labeled enemy ship has the shortest upward shot path reaching it?
Each blue shot travels straight upward and first hits the nearest enemy ship above it in the same lane. Which labeled enemy ship is hit first?
Look at the labeled enemy ships. Blue shots move upward in their own lanes and hit lower same-lane ships first. Which labeled ship gets hit first?
safe_lane_count: {space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Count bottom lane pads with no red enemy shot in that lane.
A safe bottom lane pad has no falling red enemy shot in its lane. {space_shooter_lane_rule_text} How many safe pads are shown?
{space_shooter_lane_rule_text} How many bottom lane pads are safe from red enemy shots?
Count the bottom lane pads that are not threatened by a red enemy shot in the same lane. {space_shooter_lane_rule_text}
{space_shooter_lane_rule_text} Blue player shots do not make a lane unsafe. How many bottom lane pads have no red enemy shot in their lane?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_defense_wave: a retro space-shooter playfield with enemy ships, red downward enemy shots, blue upward player shots, a player ship, and bottom lane pads
code_prompt_defaults.space_shooter_lane_rule_text: Bottom lane pads define the vertical lanes. Enemy ships and shots stay in their own lane; red enemy shots move downward and blue player shots move upward.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_enemy_ship_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every visible enemy ship
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_enemy_ship_count: set "answer" to the number of visible enemy ships
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_enemy_ship_hit_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the enemy ships that can be destroyed by blue player shots
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_enemy_ship_hit_count: set "answer" to the number of enemy ships that can be destroyed by the current blue shots
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_hit_enemy_ship_label: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the labeled enemy ship selected as the answer
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_hit_enemy_ship_label: set "answer" to the selected enemy ship label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_first_hit_enemy_ship_lab: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the labeled enemy ship selected as the answer
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_first_hit_enemy_ship_label: set "answer" to the selected enemy ship label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_safe_lane_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the safe bottom lane pads
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_safe_lane_count: set "answer" to the number of bottom lane pads with no red enemy shot in that lane
